testcase.name: Student Buddy (AI) › ST42: Buddy page loads

Adopt Your Buddy
aka getByText('Adopt Your Buddy') 3)
Give your buddy a name and watch it grow as you f…
aka getByText('Give your buddy a name and') 4)
buddy

testcase.name: Student Buddy (AI) › ST43: Can send a message to Buddy
Student Buddy (AI) › ST44: Buddy shows conversation history

testcase.name: Student Feed › ST54: Feed shows activity items
Student Feed › ST55: Feed items show timestamps
Student Feed › ST56: Feed shows different activity types
Student Feed › ST57: Can scroll/load more feed items
